status: PENDING — needs a bigger box. Wikidata Truthy is ~8B triples, ~70GB compressed (~700GB+ uncompressed), and needs ~64-128GB RAM + ~1.5-3TB disk to index. Not feasible on the 128GB/500GB DBLP box. The paper's exact 2025-04-18 snapshot is no longer on the live mirror.

dataset.name: Wikidata Truthy
dataset.version: paper used 'as of 2025-04-18' (no longer on the live mirror); rolling latest otherwise

methodology.notes: QLever result cache disabled + cleared per query. Reference engine: QLever.

caveats: Wikidata Truthy is the second dataset with a published SPARQLoscope reference (alongside DBLP).
The exact paper snapshot (2025-04-18) is unavailable; a current dump will be larger, so result counts won't match the published yaml exactly.
